text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O crosses the finish! Even<n>under all
that pressure, she never<n>yielded!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We just witnessed true majesty<n>here at Yodo this
spring!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, hehehe... Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I performed stunningly in the spring<n>Tenno Sho.
None shall ever make light<n>of me again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Were you watching, predecessors?<n>And you,
Meisho Doto?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Here I stand! The throne of the<n>Centurial Overlord
is mine for the<n>taking!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Did you see me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Good, you mustn't miss a beat. I<n>need you as my
historian to<n>immortalize each and every one of<n>my
achievements for the masses.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Burn the entirety of my glorious form<n>into those
eyes of yours! Haaah ha<n>ha!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass, that runnin' of hers...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes. Her intensity has grown fiercer<n>than ever.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Opera O is so incredible... It's<n>frightening.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll be able to keep my promise<n>and race in
the Takarazuka Kinen,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Do I even stand a chance? Ohhh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: There is nothing to fear, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yeeep?! What're you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Without the slightest hesitation, Opera<n>leaps over
the barrier and into the<n>stands.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am strong. Therefore, you needn't<n>fear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Like the star I am, I only deal with<n>feelings straight
as they come, pure<n>and simple.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have the desire to race me, to<n>cross
metaphorical blades, do you<n>not?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then steel yourself now and face me<n>with fullest
might at the Takarazuka<n>Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O... You really believe in me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... Yes! I'll... take you up on that!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And there you have it, Trainer! Our<n>next race will
be the Takarazuka<n>Kinen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall accept Doto's challenge<n>before the battle
against the older<n>generation begins in earnest.
Haaah<n>hah hah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's left her mark on the<n>Tenno Sho,
it's time to prepare for the<n>Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I thought everything was going<n>smoothly, but...

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That T.M. Opera O sure does<n>whatever the heck
she pleases.

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I thought she was just getting<n>lucky at first...
but maybe she's<n>actually a threat?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The real battle starts now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who didn't understand her<n>strength had
written her off as<n>arrogant until now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No one can deny it anymore. She's<n>made sure of
that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will be taking her seriously<n>from here
on.
choice_data_list: That means she's got more marks on her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, now many racers will be<n>devising strategies
in order to beat<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They may even work together to<n>prevent her from
finishing first.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It was the same for Spe, El, and<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We found a way to break through and<n>overcame
it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The question now is if Opera O can do<n>the same.
Those who stand out<n>become a large target.
